extension.description: Local command bridge for Jupyter, notebooks, and data-analysis workflows in VS Code.
command.executeCellByIndex: Data Bridge: Execute Cell By Index
viewContainer.title: Data Bridge
configuration.title: VSCode Data Bridge
config.host.description: Host address for the local bridge server.
config.port.description: Port for the local bridge server.
config.portSpan.description: Number of ports starting from dataBridge.port that may be probed so multiple VS Code windows can host independent bridge servers.
config.autoStart.description: Automatically start the bridge server when the extension activates.
config.followTargetCell.description: Automatically reveal the notebook cell that Data Bridge is selecting, updating, or running.
config.controlCenterAutoRefresh.descript: Automatically refresh the Data Bridge control center while the view is visible.
config.controlCenterRefreshIntervalMs.de: Refresh interval in milliseconds for the visible Data Bridge control center.
config.token.description: Optional bearer token required by the local bridge server.
config.allowArbitraryCommands.descriptio: Allow executing any VS Code command. When false, only notebook and data-analysis commands are allowed.
config.allowedCommandPrefixes.descriptio: Allowed command ID prefixes when arbitrary commands are disabled.
